results.name: umg_envoy_build_path
results.text:
USE[public_compile_and_render_path]
AIM[public_safe_human_inspectable_route]
NEED[bundled_public_content,compiler_visible_output]
SLV[public-basic-envoy]
TRG[public.default]
GATE[]
LOAD[S.PUBLIC.01,S.PUBLIC.02]

STACK[S.PUBLIC.01]
BLOCK[NB.PUBLIC.01]
MOLT[+Pprimary.sample]
ENDBLOCK
ENDSTACK
STACK[S.PUBLIC.02]
BLOCK[NB.PUBLIC.02]
MOLT[+Iinstruction.sample]
ENDBLOCK
ENDSTACK

WIN[chain]=NB.PUBLIC.02>instruction.sample
CMP[validate>normalize>emit]
